rawAssistant: I'm afraid I don't have time for such talk, traveler. My needle is itching to stitch a new coat for you, one that'll keep the mist from dampening your spirits on the north road. Come, take a look at my wares – perhaps something with a bit of protection and charm will catch your eye?
